verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I Cherish The Treasure The treasure of you Lifelong companion I give myself to you God has enabled me To walk with you faithfully And Cherish the treasure The treasure of you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: As I obey the Spirit's voice And seek to do His will I then can see the wisdom of His plan For as He works His will in me I then can love you selflessly And by His grace, can pledge my love to you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: This sacred vow I make to you Does not contain an "if" Though I'm aware that trials lie ahead I will love you and pray with you And through it all, I will stay with you Our home will be a refuge of unconditional love
